home.heroTitle: Journeys Through the Land of the Eternal Blue Sky
home.heroSubtitle: Authentic tours, nomadic encounters, and unforgettable landscapes across Mongolia.
home.aboutDesc: We design immersive journeys that connect travelers with Mongolia's landscapes, culture, and nomadic traditions. From the Gobi Desert to the northern taiga, every trip is crafted with care.
home.servicesDesc: From guided group tours to fully customized private itineraries, we provide end-to-end travel services.
home.toursDesc: Choose from our most popular Mongolia tours, or ask us to customize any itinerary.
home.blogDesc: Tips, inspiration, and stories from Mongolia.
home.contactDesc: Ready to explore Mongolia? Contact our team to plan your perfect trip.

about.heroSubtitle: A land of endless horizons, ancient traditions, and breathtaking natural wonders
about.countryDesc1: Mongolia is a vast country in East Asia, bordered by Russia to the north and China to the south. Despite being the 18th largest country in the world, it has one of the lowest population densities.
about.countryDesc2: From the endless steppe to the dramatic Gobi Desert, Mongolia offers landscapes that have remained largely unchanged for centuries.
about.cultureDesc1: Mongolian culture is deeply rooted in nomadic pastoralism. Families live in traditional gers, move seasonally with their herds, and maintain customs passed down through generations.
about.cultureDesc2: Key cultural highlights include the Naadam Festival, throat singing, eagle hunting in the west, and the enduring legacy of Chinggis Khaan.
about.climateTitle: Extreme Seasons & Best Time to Visit
about.springDesc: Mild but windy. Landscapes begin to green. Good for photography and fewer crowds.
about.summerDesc: Warm days, cool nights. Peak travel season with Naadam festivals and green pastures.
about.autumnDesc: Clear skies, golden landscapes. Ideal for trekking and wildlife watching.
about.winterDesc: Bitterly cold with temperatures below -30°C. Experience ice festivals and winter nomadic life.

services.heroSubtitle: Everything you need for an unforgettable Mongolia journey
services.intro: From guided group tours to fully customized private itineraries, we provide end-to-end travel services that let you experience Mongolia your way.
services.groupToursSubtitle: Pre-designed itineraries covering top destinations in Mongolia
services.groupToursDesc: Join a small group of like-minded travelers and explore Mongolia's highlights with an expert guide.
services.privateToursSubtitle: Tailor-made travel experiences based on your interests and schedule
services.privateToursDesc: Design your own adventure — choose your dates, destinations, activities, and pace.
services.culturalSubtitle: Nomadic homestays, traditional meals, and local lifestyle immersion
services.culturalDesc: Stay with herder families, learn traditional crafts, and experience authentic Mongolian hospitality.
services.adventureSubtitle: Horse riding, camel trekking, hiking, and national park exploration
services.adventureDesc: From horseback rides across the steppe to camel treks in the Gobi, adventure awaits.
services.transportSubtitle: Professional English-speaking guides and experienced drivers
services.transportDesc: Travel safely and comfortably in well-maintained 4x4 vehicles with knowledgeable local guides.
services.accommodationSubtitle: From hotels in Ulaanbaatar to ger camps in remote regions
services.accommodationDesc: We handle all lodging, mixing city comfort with traditional ger camp experiences.

tours.heroSubtitle: Handcrafted itineraries for every kind of traveler
tours.intro: Choose from our most popular Mongolia tours, or ask us to customize any itinerary to match your interests, dates, and travel style.

accommodation.heroSubtitle: Comfortable lodging inspired by Mongolian heritage and tradition
accommodation.intro: The Mongolian Secret History tourist complex has been operating since November 2005. Open year-round, the complex welcomes travelers in a comfortable natural environment with high-quality services inspired by Mongolian heritage.
accommodation.locationDesc: Located in Jargalant soum, approximately 114 km from Ulaanbaatar on the road to Darkhan. The area sits at about 1500 meters above sea level and is home to abundant wildlife, wildflowers, and medicinal plants.
accommodation.hotelRoomsDesc: Luxury and standard rooms with 16 beds total, modern amenities, and mountain views.
accommodation.traditionalGersDesc: 13th-century style pointed-top gers with 53 beds, offering an authentic Mongolian experience.
accommodation.restaurantDesc: Mongolian and international dishes in a traditional dining hall.
accommodation.libraryDesc: A cozy space to relax, read, and learn about Mongolian history.
accommodation.conferenceDesc: Equipped venue for meetings, events, and workshops.
accommodation.ridingDesc: Guided rides through the surrounding steppe and hills.
accommodation.archeryDesc: Traditional Mongolian archery and outdoor games.
accommodation.saunaDesc: Modern facilities to refresh after a day of adventure.
accommodation.karaokeDesc: Evening entertainment and drinks with fellow travelers.
accommodation.sportsDesc: Outdoor area for volleyball, basketball, and other activities.
accommodation.bookStayDesc: Contact us to check availability and reserve your room or ger at our camp.

blog.intro: Explore our collection of articles about Mongolia's destinations, culture, wildlife, and travel tips to help you plan your perfect journey.
blog.authorBio: Historian and storyteller who brings ancient Mongolia to life through words and journeys.

terms.heroSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before booking your Mongolia adventure
terms.bookingDesc: A deposit is required to confirm your booking. The remaining balance is due 30 days before departure. We accept bank transfer and major credit cards. All prices are quoted in US dollars unless otherwise stated.
terms.cancellationDesc: Cancellations made more than 60 days before departure receive a full refund minus the deposit. Cancellations 30–60 days before departure receive a 50% refund. Cancellations less than 30 days before departure are non-refundable.
terms.insuranceDesc: We strongly recommend that all travelers purchase comprehensive travel insurance covering trip cancellation, medical expenses, and emergency evacuation. Proof of insurance may be requested before departure.
terms.changesDesc: While we make every effort to operate tours as planned, Mongolia's remote conditions may require itinerary adjustments due to weather, road conditions, or other factors beyond our control. Your safety is our priority.
terms.healthDesc: Travelers should be in reasonable health and inform us of any medical conditions before booking. Some tours involve long drives on unpaved roads and outdoor activities in variable weather conditions.
terms.liabilityDesc: Mongolian Secret History acts as an agent for local suppliers and is not liable for acts, errors, omissions, or negligence of any such suppliers. Participation in all activities is at the traveler's own risk.

privacy.heroSubtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information
privacy.collectDesc: We collect personal information that you provide when booking tours, subscribing to newsletters, or contacting us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, travel dates, and payment information.
privacy.useDesc: Your information is used to process bookings, communicate with you about your trip, send newsletters you have subscribed to, and improve our website and services.
privacy.shareDesc: We may share your information with trusted service providers who assist in operating our business, such as payment processors, accommodation partners, and local guides.
privacy.securityDesc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.cookiesDesc: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze website traffic. You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.rightsDesc: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You may also unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time.
privacy.changesDesc: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.questionsDesc: Contact us and we will be happy to address any concerns about your personal data.
